segments.title: Radix Feature Flag Implementation
segments.summary: Radix `useId` wrapper implementation completed with documentation and isolation + stream stitch approach documented. A feature flag called `deterministicUseId` was added to allow opting out of the wrapper if needed, with the flag defaulting to enabled.

segments.title: Machinen AI Sidebar Duplicate Prompt Bug
segments.summary: Bug identified in Machinen's AI sidebar where overlapping prompts occur when hitting enter twice, causing duplicate prompts to be queued. The issue stems from debounce logic in the input handler firing on both keyup and submit events. Solution involves consolidating to single dispatch and adding server-side idempotency checks.
actions: Peter: Log prompt UUID at edge for deduplication

segments.title: React 19 Migration Planning
segments.summary: Planning for React 19 migration which will make the current hydration wrapper approach cleaner. A tracking issue will be opened to monitor the migration progress, and the current wrapper will be removed once React 19 is adopted.
actions: Justin: Open tracking issue for React 19 migration
decisions: Open tracking issue for React 19 migration
